subject: [PATCH v7 07/15] mm: preserve RWP marker across PTE rewrites

2026-06-29.patch_summary: This patch ensures that the RWP (Read-Only Write-Protection) marker is preserved across PTE (Page Table Entry) rewrites in various kernel paths, including swap, device-exclusive, migration, fork, and mprotect. Without this preservation, the RWP tracking could be silently dropped, leading to unexpected behavior when accessing pages with PAGE_NONE semantics. The patch updates several functions to restore the RWP marker after PTE rewrites, ensuring that it remains intact across different kernel operations.
